goldenComments: forEach with async callbacks creates fire-and-forget promises that are not awaited, so calendar deletions can fail silently.

findings.label: bug
findings.oneSentenceSummary: forEach with async callback is not awaited
findings.suggestionContent: WHAT: Array.prototype.forEach is used with an async callback for calendar deletions. WHY: Promises run detached; unhandled rejections and incomplete cleanup. HOW: Replace with for...of or Promise.all(map).
findings.improvedCode: for (const a of attendees) { await deleteCalendar(a); }

findings.label: bug
findings.oneSentenceSummary: Async forEach fire-and-forget on cancel path
findings.suggestionContent: WHAT: Calendar deletion uses forEach(async ...). WHY: Outer function returns before deletions finish. HOW: Use await Promise.all(attendees.map(async a => deleteCalendar(a))).

findings.label: bug
findings.suggestionContent: WHAT: sendCancelEmail is called without await. WHY: Email failures are swallowed. HOW: await sendCancelEmail(booking).
